mapper.insert: insert into batch.outbox_event ( tenant_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, event_key, payload_json, publish_status, publish_attempt, next_publish_at, trace_id ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{eventKey}, #{payloadJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{publishStatus}, #{publishAttempt}, #{nextPublishAt}, #{traceId} ) on conflict (tenant_id, event_key) do nothing
mapper.update: update batch.outbox_event set publish_status = #{publishingStatus}, publish_attempt = publish_attempt + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and publish_status in (#{pendingStatus1}, #{pendingStatus2})
